options.name: --format
options.description:
(Default: Auto) Format of coverage files. Default:
Auto Valid values: Auto, Cobertura, SonarQube

options.name: --directory
options.description:
Directory where coverage files are located. Default:
Current directory

options.name: --glob-patterns
options.description:
(Default: **/*.xml) Glob patterns of coverage file
locations. Default: **/*.xml

options.name: --include
options.description:
Glob patterns of files to include in the coverage
analysis.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Glob patterns of files to exclude from the coverage
analysis.

options.name: --delta
options.description: Calculate coverage for changed lines only.

options.name: --delta-base
options.description:
(Default: origin/main) Base branch or commit to
compare against for delta coverage. Default:
origin/main
